title: Competitive Agent Selection
constraints: At least three agents must independently solve the same problem
A separate judge agent must evaluate all solutions and pick the best
The judge must not be one of the competing agents
The judge must provide a rationale for its selection
hints: Run all three solver agents in parallel (or sequentially) on the same input
Collect all outputs, then pass them to the judge agent with clear labels
Give the judge explicit evaluation criteria (correctness, clarity, completeness) to score against

starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew, Process
from crewai import LLM

llm = LLM(model="gpt-4o-mini")

# BUG: Only one agent solves the problem — no competition or comparison
# TODO: Add two more solver agents and a judge to pick the best solution
solver = Agent(
    role="Problem Solver",
    goal="Solve coding challenges with clean, efficient solutions",
    backstory="You are an experienced software engineer.",
    llm=llm,
)

solve_task = Task(
    description="Write a function to find the longest palindromic substring in a given string. Problem: {problem}",
    expected_output="A working Python function with explanation",
    agent=solver,
)

crew = Crew(
    agents=[solver],
    tasks=[solve_task],
    process=Process.sequential,
)

result = crew.kickoff(inputs={"problem": "Find the longest palindromic substring in a given string"})
print(result)
starterCode.langgraph:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langgraph.graph import StateGraph, START, END
from typing import TypedDict

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

class State(TypedDict):
    problem: str
    solution: str

# BUG: Only one solver node — no competition or judging
# TODO: Add multiple solver nodes and a judge node
def solve(state: State) -> dict:
    prompt = f"Write a Python function to solve: {state['problem']}. Provide clean, efficient code with explanation."
    response = llm.invoke(prompt)
    return {"solution": response.content}

graph = StateGraph(State)
graph.add_node("solve", solve)
graph.add_edge(START, "solve")
graph.add_edge("solve", END)

app = graph.compile()
result = app.invoke({"problem": "Find the longest palindromic substring in a given string", "solution": ""})
print(result["solution"])
starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner

# BUG: Only one agent solves the problem — no competition or comparison
# TODO: Add two more solver agents and a judge to pick the best solution
solver = Agent(
    name="Problem Solver",
    instructions="You are an experienced software engineer. Solve coding challenges with clean, efficient solutions.",
)

result = Runner.run_sync(
    solver,
    "Write a function to find the longest palindromic substring in a given string.",
)
print(result.final_output)

evaluationCriteria.label: Multiple solver agents
evaluationCriteria.description: At least three agents independently solve the same problem

evaluationCriteria.label: Judge agent evaluates solutions
evaluationCriteria.description: A separate judge agent reviews all solutions and selects the best one

evaluationCriteria.label: Judge provides rationale
evaluationCriteria.description: The judge explains why the selected solution is the best

evaluationCriteria.label: Best solution is selected
evaluationCriteria.description: The final output is the solution the judge deemed best, not an arbitrary pick
